headline: Why Are Intel (INTC) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) jumped 5.9% in the afternoon session after the market continued to digest the Bank of America double upgrade while the chip sector accelerated on continued Iran peace deal momentum.

headline: Bank of America makes major reset to Intel stock price target
summary: On June 11, Intel (INTC) received a Wall Street revamp that could flip the script on its stock performance, according to a research note shared with me at TheStreet. Investors had been bracing for more skepticism around Intel’s turnaround. The company still faces fierce pressure from Nvidia, ...

headline: 3 Reasons to Sell BAC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead

headline: BofA reinstates Williams-Sonoma at Buy, cites structural share gains
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America reinstated coverage of Williams-Sonoma with a Buy rating and a $250 price target in a note on Friday, describing the home goods retailer as "a rare, quality compounder in consumer discretionary" positioned to keep gaining market share.

headline: Bank Of America (BAC) Stock Valuation After Strong Q1 Results And Upgraded Markets Revenue Outlook
summary: Bank of America (BAC) has drawn fresh attention after reporting strong first quarter results, with deposits at $2.02 trillion and solid contributions from wealth management and markets, particularly equities trading. See our latest analysis for Bank of America. At a share price of US$55.16, Bank of America has a 90 day share price return of 18.07% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 26.31%, suggesting momentum has picked up recently after a modest decline of 1.41% year to date.
